name: Clicker Heroes
description: An epic idle clicker RPG! Tap to defeat monsters, hire heroes, and level up to unlock unique abilities.

name: Mr. Mine
description: An addictive mining idle game by Playsaurus. Upgrade your drill, explore deep underground, and find rare treasures.

name: Poker Quest
description: A fantasy roguelike where you fight through a world of monsters using a standard deck of playing cards.

name: Grindcraft
description: A craft-them-all idle game inspired by Minecraft. Grind for resources and craft your way to victory.

name: Fray Fight
description: A survivors-like action roguelite. Fight against endless waves of Vikings and monsters.

name: Head Soccer 2022
description: A fast-paced soccer game where you use your head to score goals and win the tournament!

name: Basketball King
description: Test your shooting skills and become the ultimate Basketball King in this addictive sports game.

name: Rooftop Duel
description: Engage in intense rooftop duels! Aim, shoot, and knock your opponent off the building.
